title: card.rs: meta_tag_re misses reversed attribute order
description: parse_og_meta uses meta_tag_re which requires property/name to appear BEFORE content in the <meta> tag. Many CMS systems (WordPress via Yoast, some CDNs) emit tags with content first, e.g. <meta content="Title" property="og:title" />. These produce zero captures, silently returning an empty CardMeta. The card is then discarded (title.is_empty() check). Result: preview cards never fetched for a large fraction of real-world URLs. Fix: use two separate regexes or scan for each attribute independently.
close_reason: Fixed: meta tag regex now matches reversed attribute order.
